name: Mead Johnson Nutrition Company
description: Mead Johnson Nutrition is a global leader in pediatric nutrition, dedicated to developing science-based products that support the health and development of infants and children. Founded over a century ago, the company offers a wide range of nutritional solutions, including its flagship Enfamil brand, trusted by parents and healthcare professionals worldwide. Following its acquisition in 2017, Mead Johnson Nutrition now operates as a key division of Reckitt, a British multinational consumer goods company, continuing its commitment to providing high-quality nutritional products across more than 50 countries to meet the evolving needs of families.
